CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, geom VARCHAR NOT NULL, srid INTEGER NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO spatial_data (id, geom, srid) VALUES (1, 'POLYGON((-16 20.25, -16.1 20.35, -15.9 20.35, -16 20.25))', 4326);
SELECT ST_AsText(ST_Transform(geom, 1, NULL, '+proj=merc +ellps=GRS80')) FROM spatial_data WHERE srid = 4326;
SELECT ST_AsText(ST_Transform(geom, 4326, '+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84')) AS transformed_geom FROM spatial_data WHERE srid = 2249;
SELECT S.id, ST_AsText(ST_Transform(S.geom, 1, NULL, '+proj=latlong +ellps=WGS84')) AS transformed_geom FROM spatial_data S WHERE S.srid = 4326;
SELECT A.id, ST_AsText(ST_Transform(A.geom, B.srid, NULL, NULL)) FROM spatial_data A JOIN spatial_data B ON A.id = B.id WHERE A.srid <> B.srid;
